selection_summary: candidate_06 has the strongest novel engine in the field: a case-by-case claims workflow that can keep generating concrete scenes, a working-class protagonist embedded in a coercive system, and escalating consequences linking bodily weirdness to class, labor, intimacy, fraud, and personhood. It feels original without depending on decorative strangeness and has substantial tonal and aesthetic headroom.
anti_bias_statement: Risk profile or genre mode was not treated as a defect in itself; comic, erotic, speculative, grotesque, and formally strange candidates were judged on durability, scene power, character richness, and consequence range rather than on respectability.
